title.en: Rainbow flags await Egypt and Iran at awkward World Cup Pride Match
title.zh-CN: 彩虹旗在尴尬的世界杯骄傲比赛中等待埃及和伊朗

summary.en: Iran's coach refuses to discuss pride celebrations in Seattle, where his country face Egypt in a crucial Group G match.
summary.zh-CN: 伊朗教练拒绝讨论在西雅图举行的骄傲庆祝活动，他的国家在关键的G组比赛中面对埃及。

title.en: Has VAR become a lottery at the World Cup?
title.zh-CN: VAR是否在世界杯上成为彩票？

summary.en: After a week of strange decisions many supporters have been left scratching their heads with VAR.
summary.zh-CN: 经过一周的奇怪决定，许多支持者被VAR挠头。

title.en: Start Rashford? Bring O'Reilly back? Pick your England XI to face Panama
title.zh-CN: 启动拉什福德？让奥莱利回来？选择您的英格兰XI面对巴拿马

summary.en: Who should start for England against Panama in their final World Cup group game? It's time to put yourself in Thomas Tuchel's shoes.
summary.zh-CN: 谁应该在英格兰队对阵巴拿马队的最后一场世界杯小组赛中首发？是时候站在Thomas Tuchel的立场了。

title.en: What do numbers tell us about Scotland's World Cup attacking intent?
title.zh-CN: 关于苏格兰世界杯的攻击意图，数字告诉我们什么？

summary.en: BBC Scotland crunches the numbers behind Steve Clarke's blunt attack and looks at the potential deeper issues.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司苏格兰频道（ BBC Scotland ）对史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）的直言不讳的攻击背后的数字进行了

title.en: How Oyarzabal shows Spain are more than just Yamal - Azpilicueta
title.zh-CN: Oyarzabal如何展示西班牙不仅仅是亚马尔- Azpilicueta

summary.en: Former Spain captain Cesar Azpilicueta explains why La Roja head coach Luis de la Fuente has the team and squad he needs for success in the next month.
summary.zh-CN: 前西班牙队队长塞萨尔·阿斯皮利奎塔（ Cesar Azpilicueta ）解释了为什么拉罗哈主教练路易斯·德拉富恩特（ Luis de la Fuente ）拥有下个月取得成功所需的球队和阵容。

title.en: From 42% to 5.26% - how Scotland's World Cup hopes are fading
title.zh-CN: 从42%降至5.26% --苏格兰世界杯的希望正在消退

summary.en: Defeat against Brazil left Scotland in a precarious position, but little has gone their way since either.
summary.zh-CN: 对巴西的失利使苏格兰处于不稳定的境地，但从那时起，苏格兰也没有什么进展。

title.en: Turkey end World Cup on high with last-gasp win over USA
title.zh-CN: 土耳其以最后一场战胜美国的比赛结束世界杯

summary.en: Turkey come out on top in the last minute of an end-to-end 3-2 win over a second string USA side, in their final Group D match at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
summary.zh-CN: 土耳其队在洛杉矶SoFi体育场举行的最后一场D组比赛中，以3-2战胜了第二弦美国队的最后一分钟名列前茅。

title.en: Brobbey on target again as Netherlands beat Tunisia to win group
title.zh-CN: 布罗比再次命中目标，荷兰击败突尼斯赢得小组赛

summary.en: Brian Brobbey scores for the second game in a row as Netherlands defeat Tunisia 3-1 to top Group F, setting up a match against Morocco in the last 32 at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 布莱恩·布罗比（ Brian Brobbey ）连续第二场比赛得分，荷兰以3比1击败突尼斯队，以F组领先，在世界杯的最后32场比赛中与摩洛哥队进行了一场比赛。

title.en: Australia through and Paraguay close following draw between sides
title.zh-CN: 澳大利亚通过和巴拉圭在双方平局后关闭

summary.en: Australia sealed their passage to the last 32 and Paraguay are almost certain to join them after they shared a drab draw in San Francisco which suited both sides.
summary.zh-CN: 澳大利亚封锁了他们通往最后32名球员的通道，巴拉圭几乎肯定会在他们在旧金山进行了一场适合双方的单调抽签后加入他们的行列。

title.en: How are the TV picks decided for the World Cup's round of 32?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯32强的电视选秀权是如何决定的？

summary.en: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains the complexities behind television selections for the 2026 World Cup's round of 32 fixtures
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport的Ask Me Anything团队解释了2026年世界杯32场比赛电视选择背后的复杂性

title.en: Hart explains how goalkeepers are struggling with World Cup ball
title.zh-CN: 哈特解释了守门员如何为世界杯球而苦苦挣扎

summary.en: Former England goalkeeper Joe Hart answers your questions about the Trionda World Cup ball and how it might be affecting goalkeepers at the tournament.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰守门员乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）回答了您关于特里奥达世界杯球的问题，以及它可能对比赛守门员产生的影响。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 19
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星19号

summary.en: Will you get today's World Cup player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的世界杯球员吗？

title.en: What is SkyJo? The card game being played in the England camp
title.zh-CN: SkyJo是什么？在英格兰营地玩的纸牌游戏

summary.en: As England try to get their game right on the pitch, the games they play off the field are performing a key role in team bonding - as Morgan Rogers reveals to BBC Sport.
summary.zh-CN: 当英格兰队试图在球场上取得好成绩时，他们在球场外进行的比赛在团队凝聚力方面发挥着关键作用-正如摩根·罗杰斯向BBC Sport透露的那样。

title.en: Scotland now have 5.26% chance of staying in World Cup - but there's still hope
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰现在有5.26 ％的机会参加世界杯-但仍然有希望

summary.en: Scotland are on the brink of elimination from the World Cup - but there is still a glimmer of hope for Steve Clarke's side.
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰正处于世界杯淘汰赛的边缘，但史蒂夫·克拉克方面仍有一线希望。

title.en: England latest: 'Tuchel has a number of issues to address ahead of Panama'
title.zh-CN: 英格兰最新消息： “图切尔在巴拿马之前有许多问题需要解决”

title.en: Group winners USA beaten as Turkey restore pride with thrilling victory

summary.en: Eliminated Turkey scored a 98th-minute winner to clinch a 3-2 victory over World Cup co-hosts USA, who will face Bosnia-Herzegovina in the round of 32.

title.en: Australia progress with bore draw which looks set to also suit Paraguay

summary.en: Australia are into the last 32 of the World Cup and Paraguay are well placed to join them after a 0-0 draw in San Francisco which suited both sides.

summary.en: The US men’s national team have already made history this summer. They scored the most goals they ever have in a single World Cup game, won two straight games in the tournament for the first time in...

title.en: Socceroos secure place in World Cup last 32 after nerve-shredding draw with Paraguay

summary.en: It was not a match of high distinction, but all the Socceroos needed was a pass against Paraguay, and their 0-0 draw in San Francisco Bay Area stadium booked a place in the World Cup knockout phase...

title.en: Man City agree record fee with Forest for Anderson

summary.en: Manchester City agree a club record deal with Nottingham Forest to sign England midfielder Elliot Anderson.

summary.en: Ivory Coast ease past Curacao in their World Cup Group E clash courtesy of a Nicolas Pepe brace, confirming their qualification in the knockout stages of the competition for the first time in their...

title.en: Plata's 'touch of gold' gives Ecuador lead against Germany

summary.en: Gonzalo Plata reacts quickest to direct Kevin Rodriuguez' flick on over Manuel Neuer, to give Ecuador a 2-1 lead over Germany in their FIFA World Cup Group E match at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

title.en: Germany goal should have been ruled out for 'endangering opponent'

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Joe Hart, Ellen White and Lucas Leiva explain why Alexander Pavlovic's high boot in the build-up to Leroy Sane's goal was an example of "endangering the opponent".

title.en: 'Brilliant finish' - Pepe gets his second as Ivory Coast double their lead

summary.en: Nicolas Pepe gets on the end of Ibrahima Sangare's "incisive pass" to score his second of the game, as Ivory Coast take a 2-0 lead against Curacao in their Group E match at Philadelphia Stadium.

title.en: Sane fires Germany ahead as Ecuador calls for foul waived away

summary.en: Leroy Sane gives Germany a 1-0 lead against Ecuador in the second minute of the World Cup Group E match at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

summary.en: What is the mood among Scotland fans and pundits post-group stage at the World Cup?

summary.en: Cody Gakpo is thriving with the Netherlands but increased competition means his Liverpool future is uncertain.

summary.en: Tottenham confirm the signing of Netherlands midfielder Victoria Pelova following her exit from Arsenal.
